title: T-009 — API: PO numbering service (PO-YYYY-NNNNN)
prompt:
Implement deterministic PO number generation per PRD §5.4 + §14.1 (po_number_format, po_number_prefix). Service `src/lib/services/po-numbering.ts` exposes `generatePoNumber(tenantId, date): Promise<string>`. Reads planning_settings.po_number_format ICU pattern for the tenant; produces 'PO-2026-00001' style with strict monotonic sequence per (tenant, year) using a Postgres advisory lock or a `po_number_sequences` table. Idempotent under concurrent calls.

RED test: `src/lib/services/__tests__/po-numbering.test.ts` runs 50 concurrent calls in same tenant+year and asserts 50 distinct sequential numbers, none skipped.

pipeline_inputs.description: Concurrency-safe PO numbering generator honoring per-tenant ICU pattern from planning_settings.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use a dedicated `planning_number_sequences` table with PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, sequence_kind, year) and `next_value` column, updated via UPDATE ... RETURNING under serializable isolation OR advisory lock pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtext(tenant_id::text || ':po:' || year)). ICU pattern parsing minimal: support {YYYY} and {NNNNN} (zero-padded). Reset every Jan 1 per tenant. Error on missing planning_settings row (auto-seeded defaults at tenant onboarding).
out_of_scope: WO numbering (T-018 reuses pattern with WIP-suffix)
acceptance_criteria: Given 50 concurrent calls for tenant T in year 2026, when promises settle, then 50 distinct values 'PO-2026-00001'..'PO-2026-00050' are returned with no duplicates and no gaps.
Given tenant T1 generates 'PO-2026-00005' and tenant T2 makes its first call same year, when T2 resolves, then it returns 'PO-2026-00001'.
Given the year rolls from 2026 to 2027 mid-test, when the next call is made on 2027-01-01, then sequence resets to 'PO-2027-00001'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/lib/services/__tests__/po-numbering.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED concurrency test using Promise.all of 50 calls; assert distinct + sequential.
risk_red_lines: Do not use uuidv4 or random — sequence must be strictly monotonic per tenant+year.
Do not leak sequences across tenants.
Do not skip the advisory lock or the test will be flaky under contention.
